session.tool_result: 3:# Title prefix for erk-pr issues (with trailing space for easy stripping) 4:ERK_PR_TITLE_PREFIX = "[erk-pr] " 6:# Title prefix for erk-learn issues (with trailing space for easy stripping) 7:ERK_LEARN_TITLE_PREFIX = "[erk-learn] " 10:def has_plan_title_prefix(title: str) -> bool: 11: """Return True if title starts with either [erk-pr] or [erk-learn] prefix.""" 64:ERK_PR_LABEL = "erk-pr" 67:ERK_LEARN_LABEL = "erk-learn"

1→"""Shared constants for erk CLI commands.""" 2→ 3→# Title prefix for erk-pr issues (with trailing space for easy stripping) 4→ERK_PR_TITLE_PREFIX = "[erk-pr] " 5→ 6→# Title prefix for erk-learn issues (with trailing space for easy stripping) 7→ERK_LEARN_TITLE_PREFIX = "[erk-learn] " 8→ 9→ 10→def has_plan_title_prefix(title: str) -> bool: 11→ """Return True if title starts with either [erk-pr] or [erk-learn] prefix.""" 12→ return title.startswith(ERK_PR_TITLE_PREFIX) or title.startswith(ERK_LEARN_TITLE_PREFIX) 13→ 14→ 15→# Plan markdown heading prefix (with trailing space for easy stripping) 16→PLAN_HEADING_PREFIX = "Plan: " 17→ 18→# PR title prefix for plan-originated PRs 19→PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX = "plnd/" 20→

session.assistant: Both index.md and tripwires.md files are auto-generated from frontmatter. Since the new docs already have proper frontmatter with `tripwires:` sections, they'll be picked up when `erk docs sync` runs. The plan says to "add index entries and tripwires" - but since these are auto-generated, the correct approach is to regenerate via `erk docs sync`:

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Run `erk docs sync` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk/ and report the output. This regenerates docs/learned/index.md and category tripwires.md files from frontmatter of learned docs.

session.tool_result:
The `erk docs sync` command completed successfully. Here's a summary of the results:
**Output Summary:** - **Updated 15 files**: Index and tripwire files were regenerated across multiple categories - **Unchanged: 42 files**: Existing documentation files that didn't require changes - **Total Tripwires Collected: 913**
**Key Changes:** - Root index regenerated: `index.md` and `tripwires-index.md` - Category indexes updated (7 files): architecture, cli, erk, objectives, planning, pr-operations, tui - Category tripwires updated (8 files): Same categories plus associated tripwires.md files
**Tripwire Statistics by Category:** - **planning**: 131 tripwires (largest category) - **architecture**: 205 tripwires with 26 pattern-based matches - **cli**: 116 tripwires - **tui**: 65 tripwires - **testing**: 69 tripwires with 5 pattern-based matches - **objectives**: 49 tripwires - **pr-operations**: 20 tripwires - Plus 20+ other smaller categories
The documentation regeneration succeeded with 15 total changes across docs/learned/ and associated index/tripwire files. agentId: a635c0b (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
